Afghanistan.notes: e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL).. The Government of Singapore advises its citizens not to travel to Afghanistan due to the ongoing situation in the country.. ✓

Albania.notes: May enter Albania using a national ID card in lieu of a passport.. ✓

Algeria.notes: Application for a tourist visa to Algeria must be accompanied either by a certificate of accommodation.. Persons may be denied entry if entering with a passport containing visas or stamps issued by Israel.. Visitors on tours organized to some southern regions by an approved travel agency may obtain a visa on arrival for up to 30 days.. ✓

Angola.notes: 30 days per trip, but no more than 90 days within any 1 calendar year for tourism purposes only.. Visitors must have a return/onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation.. An International Certificate of Vaccination is required.. ✓

Australia.notes: 90 days on each visit in a 12-month period if granted.. May enter using SmartGate on arrival in Australia.. Also eligible for a visitor visa (subclass 600) with a validity of six years, allowing a maximum stay of three months per entry during the visa's validity period.. X

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Azerbaijan.notes: Available at airports.. Singaporeans of Armenian origin will be permanently banned from entering Azerbaijan and will be included into the "list of persona non grata ".. X

Bangladesh.notes: Not available at all entry points.. X

Belarus.notes: Must arrive and depart via Minsk International Airport.. X

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate.. ✓

Bhutan.notes: The Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of 200 USD per person, per night for almost all visitors to Bhutan. Additionally, if payment is made in US dollars from September 1, 2023 to August 31, 2027, the SDF is 100 USD.. X

Bolivia.notes: Visitors must complete an online application, but still need to visit the embassy to receive the visa in their passport.. X

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Burundi.notes: From December 2021, passengers of all countries that require a visa, can now obtain a visa on arrival at Bujumbura International Airport, and all land borders.. X

Cameroon.notes: Holders of a pre-arranged approval issued by "Le Delegue General de la Surete" can obtain a visa on arrival.. X

Canada.notes: eTA required if arriving by air; not required if arriving by land or sea.. ✓

Cape Verde.notes: Must register online at least five days prior to arrival.. Visitors must pay the Airport Security Fee (TSA) before visiting. The cost is 3,400 CVE (approx. 31 EUR ) and can be paid via the online platform (EASE).. ✓

Chad.notes: According to the e-Visa site, citizens of Singapore are exempt from visa requirements. The change is not reflected in IATA Timatic, so travelers may be denied boarding.. X

China.notes: A 30-day mutual visa waiver agreement was signed with China and was effective on 9 February 2024.. ✓

Colombia.notes: 90 days - extendable up to 180-day stay within a 1-year period.. ✓

Republic of the Congo.notes: Except passengers with a VIP invitation.. X

Croatia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Czech Republic.notes: 3 months, regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen Area countries (pursuant to the Czech Republic-Singapore bilateral agreement that was concluded before the Czech Republic joined the European Union and the Schengen Area).. ✓

Denmark.notes: 3 months within the past 6 months, regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries, but including time spent in other Nordic countries.. ✓

Egypt.notes: 15 day free visa on arrival if arriving and departing from Sharm El-Sheikh, St Catherine and Taba Airports. X

Estonia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Ethiopia.notes: Visa on arrival is obtainable only at Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa is available for 30 or 90 days.. X

Finland.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

France.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area (in Regions of France ).. ✓

Gabon.notes: According to a document published by the Ministry of foreign affairs of Gabon, citizens of Singapore are exempt from visa requirements. The change is not reflected in IATA Timatic, so travelers may be denied boarding.. X

Germany.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa.. Holders of a valid Person of Indian Origin or Overseas Citizen of India Card are exempt from visa requirements, and may travel to India unlimited times.. ✓

Iran.notes: 15 days within any 6-month period.. The Government of Singapore advises its citizens not to travel to Iran due to security issues in the country.. X

Iraq.notes: The Government of Singapore advises its citizens not to travel to Iraq due to the security situation in the country.. X

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Jordan.notes: A 40 JOD Visa can be obtained upon arrival, but the fee can be waived for single entry evisa or visa on arrival if purchase Jordan Pass, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge ).. X

South Korea.notes: Singapore citizens can enter South Korea up to 90 days without a visa.. A K-ETA application can be completed up to 24 hours before boarding a flight. It will be valid for 3 years.. Singapore citizens are exempt from the K-ETA requirement from 1 April 2023 until 31 December 2026.. ✓

Kuwait.notes: e-Visa is also available online.. X

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. From 1 September 2025, citizens of Singapore intending to enter Latvia without a visa or residence permit are required to submit an electronic declaration form at least 48 hours before seeking entry into Latvia.. ✓

Lebanon.notes: 1 month extendable for 2 additional months.. Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or stamp in the passport, and in possession of a phone number & address to be visited in Lebanon, and a non-refundable onward or round trip ticket.. The Government of Singapore advises its citizens not to travel to Lebanon due to the volatile situation in the country.. X

Libya.notes: The Government of Singapore advises its citizens not to travel to Libya due to civil unrest, and the political instability in the country.. X

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Madagascar.notes: For stays of 61 to 90 days, the visa fee is 59 USD.. X

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Mozambique.notes: Visitors must register their ETA on the e-Visa platform at least 48 hours before travel and pay a processing fee of 48 USD, provided that they present normal passports valid for 6 months on arrival, as well as a return or onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation. In addition, an extension of 30 days is possible.. ✓

Myanmar.notes: The Government of Singapore advises its citizens not to travel to Myanmar due to the security situation in the country. Singaporeans are advised to leave as soon as possible.. ✓

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area ( European Netherlands ).. ✓

New Zealand.notes: May enter using eGate.. International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy must be paid upon requesting an Electronic Travel Authority.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure. Such travellers are not required to pay the International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy.. X

Nigeria.notes: Holders of written e-visa approval issued by Immigration Authority Headquarters in Abuja, can obtain a visa on arrival.. ✓

Norway.notes: 3 months within the past 6 months, regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries, but including time spent in other Nordic countries. ✓

Palau.notes: A visa is issued free of charge upon arrival at any port of entry.. X

Philippines.notes: A single or multiple entry e-Visa for stays of up to 59 days is also available.. ✓

Poland.notes: 90 days within a 180-day period, regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries (pursuant to the Poland-Singapore bilateral agreement regulating visa-free traffic that was concluded before Poland joined the European Union and the Schengen Area).. ✓

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Romania.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Russia.notes: Holders of an APEC Business Travel Card (ABTC) travelling on business do not require a visa.. ✓

São Tomé and Príncipe.notes: Visitors holding a visa issued by the United States or a Schengen Member State together with a passport valid for a minimum of 3 months from the arrival date may enter visa-free for a stay of up to 15 days. X

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country.. X

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online 30 days single entry for 100 USD, 90 days multiple entry for 200 USD and 180 days multiple entry for 350 USD.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel.. X

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Sri Lanka.notes: Citizens of Singapore are exempt from the requirement of obtaining a tourist standard e-Visa.. ✓

Sudan.notes: Pre-Approved Visa can be obtained on arrival.. ✓

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available.. ✓

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Syria.notes: Singaporeans of Syrian origin, or Singaporeans whose passport states that they were born in Algeria, Bahrain, Jordan, Kuwait, Lebanon, Mauritania, Morocco, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Somalia, Sudan, Syria, Tunisia, United Arab Emirates or Yemen are visa exempt.. X

Turkmenistan.notes: When transiting between two non-bordering countries, visitors can obtain a Turkmenistan transit visa for a five-day stay. This must be applied for in advance at the Turkmenistan Embassy. Visitors must also submit copies of the visas for the country of entry into Turkmenistan and the country of departure from Turkmenistan. Visa fee is 20 USD.. ✓

Ukraine.notes: The Government of Singapore has advised its citizens not to travel to Ukraine due to Russia's continued aggression towards Ukraine. Singaporeans in Ukraine are advised to leave as soon as possible.. ✓

United Arab Emirates.notes: Visa on Arrival is issued free of charge for stays not exceeding 90 Days.. Extension is possible for a fee.. ✓

United Kingdom.notes: ETA UK (valid for 2 years when issued) required.. Adults can use ePassport gates.. ✓

United States.notes: ESTA is valid for 2 years from the date of issuance.. ESTA is also required when entering the country by cruise ship or land.. A Form I-94 is required for entry into the United States by land. It carries a $30 fee and can be obtained either online or upon arrival.. Visa required for nationals of VWP countries who have travelled or been present in Iran, Iraq, Libya, North Korea, Somalia, Sudan, Syria or Yemen at any time on or after 1 March 2011 or Cuba at any time on or after 12 January 2021, or nationals of VWP countries who are also nationals of Iran, Iraq, North Korea, Sudan or Syria. Exceptions apply if the travel was in military or diplomatic service of the VWP country.. ✓

Venezuela.notes: Introduction of Electronic Visa System for Tourist and Business Travelers.. X

Yemen.notes: The Government of Singapore has advised its citizens not to travel to Yemen due to the ongoing civil war in the country. Singaporeans currently in Yemen are advised to leave immediately.. Separately, Yemen introduced an e-Visa system for visitors who meet certain eligibility requirements (group travel of 10 or more people, business trips, and transit etc.).. ✓

Abkhazia.stay: Tourists from all countries (except Georgia) can visit Abkhazia for a period not exceeding 24 hours as part of an organized tourist group..

Mount Athos.stay: Special permit required (4 days: 25 EUR for Orthodox visitors, 35 EUR for non-Orthodox visitors, 18 EUR for students). There is a visitors' quota: maximum 100 Orthodox and 10 non-Orthodox per day and women are not allowed..

Jan Mayen.stay: Permit issued by the local police required for staying for less than 24 hours and permit issued by the Norwegian police for staying for more than 24 hours..

South Ossetia.stay: To enter South Ossetia, visitors must have a multiple-entry visa for Russia and register their stay with the Migration Service of the Ministry of Internal Affairs within 3 days..

Transnistria.stay: Visitors must complete and obtain a temporary migration card at the border checkpoint. The maximum period of stay is 45 days, and it can be extended multiple times through this card..

Eritrea outside Asmara.stay: To travel in the rest of the country, a Travel Permit for Foreigners is required (20 Eritrean nakfa ).

Tristan da Cunha.stay: Permission to land required for 15/30 pounds sterling (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island or 20 pounds sterling for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Islands.

Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic.stay: Undefined visa regime in the Western Sahara controlled territory.

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.stay: OIVR permit required (15+5 Tajikistani Somoni ) and another special permit (free of charge) is required for Lake Sarez.

India PAP/RAP.stay: Protected Area Permit (PAP) required for whole states of Nagaland and Sikkim and parts of states Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttaranchal, Jammu and Kashmir, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh. Restricted Area Permit (RAP) is required for all of Andaman and Nicobar Islands and parts of Sikkim. Some of these requirements are occasionally lifted for a year.

Kish Island.stay: 14 days; Visitors to Kish Island do not require a visa.

North Korea outside Pyongyang.stay: People are not allowed to leave the capital city, tourists can only leave the capital with a governmental tourist guide (no independent moving)

Palestine.stay: Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed.

Sabah and Sarawak.stay: These states have their own immigration authorities and a passport is required to travel to them, however, the same visa applies.

Tibet Autonomous Region.stay: Tibet Travel Permit required (10 US Dollars).

Bermuda.stay: Up to 6 months, decided on arrival

French West Indies.stay: French West Indies refers to Martinique, Guadeloupe, Saint Martin and Saint Barthélemy.

Puerto Rico.stay: Visa not required under the Visa Waiver Program, for 90 days on arrival from overseas for 2 years. ESTA required.

U.S. Virgin Islands.stay: Visa not required under the Visa Waiver Program, for 90 days on arrival from overseas for 2 years. ESTA required.

Pitcairn Islands.stay: 14 days visa-free and landing fee 35 USD or tax of 5 USD if not going ashore.

United States Minor Outlying Islands.stay: Special permits required for Baker Island, Howland Island, Jarvis Island, Johnston Atoll, Kingman Reef, Midway Atoll, Palmyra Atoll and Wake Island.

Galápagos.stay: 60 days; Visitors must pre-register to receive a 20 USD Transit Control Card (TCT)..

Falkland Islands.stay: A visitor permit is normally issued as a stamp in the passport on arrival, The maximum validity period is 1 month..

South Georgia and the South Sandwich Isl.stay: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 month for 110/160 pounds sterling )..

Antarctica.stay: Special permits required for British Antarctic Territory, French Southern and Antarctic Lands, Argentine Antarctica, Australian Antarctic Territory, Chilean Antarctic Territory, Heard Island and McDonald Islands, Peter I Island, Queen Maud Land, Ross Dependency..
